title: Slide CSS design system polish
steps: Polish title slide — accent bar, spacing, subtle depth
Polish content slide — accent left-border heading, better bullets
Polish code slide — terminal-style header bar, improved padding
Polish metrics slide — card treatment for stat items
Polish closing slide — accent gradient wash, prominent CTA
acceptance_criteria: All 5 slide types look visually polished in both light and dark themes
No component/TSX changes — pure CSS only
Existing theme and accent token system preserved
